positive: A stylized, minimalist mountain landscape silhouette printed on a light pastel background. The scene features sharp, layered peaks in varying depths, conveying a sense of epic scale and journey. Include abstract geometric flora and celestial elements like crescent moons and radiating stars integrated into the mountains. The style should be clean linework combined with solid color blocking, evoking Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock prints meets modern graphic design. Use a limited, harmonious color palette: deep slate blue, sage green, burnt orange, and crisp cream white. High contrast, central composition, excellent for repeating patterns or single placement on apparel. Vector art feel, perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, messy, blurry, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, trademark, poor composition, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low detail
